title: Hire Expert to Create a Call Center from with Monday.com
excerpt: Looking to hire a expert in Monday.com to develop a Call Center platform to be use with in Monday.com for our 3 departments within our company. We are a company of ( 10 personnel) and we use Monday.com as our primary CRM…

posts.author: Sales816Solar (On'Rea Knox-Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking to hire a expert in Monday.com to develop a Call Center platform to be use with in Monday.com for our 3 departments within our company. We are a company of ( 10 personnel) and we use Monday.com as our primary CRM and have had no luck with out side applications.

Looking to hire immediately.

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @Sales816Solar

I would love to sit down and discuss your use-case. I’ve worked with many companies to setup monday.com for their small and mid-size businesses. I have a couple of eCommerce companies that have setup an on-call center within monday.com along with Aircall.

Aircall has a great app integration with monday.com that limits the amount of custom development required. you can check it out here: https://aircall.io/call-center-software-integrations/monday/
additionally if you’d like some coaching through the process to use that app or a different kind of setup I’d be happy to discuss more.

you can schedule a time to discuss more with me here: Calendly - Tim Little

I look forward to hearing from you!

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sales816Solar,

Welcome to the monday.com community!

upstream can help. We are monday.com Platinum Partners, APAC Partner of the Year for 2020 and Preferred Partners so we have a great deal of industry relevant experience and expertise.

You’ll have access to our dedicated teams including Solutions Engineers and our full stack Dev Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements. I’d love to know in more detail about how you’re currently using the platform and what you’d like to get out of it for your use case.

Please feel free to drop me an email via peta@upstreamtech.io or better yet book an informal chat/discovery call at a time that suits you here. No obligations, of course.

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sales816Solar

This is absolutely doable via monday.com. We’ve implemented and customised several monday.com CRMs. My name is Elena and I’m the founder of Kick Consulting, monday.com silver partner from Australia. We have a truly global team, so we can work in any time zone.

We offer a complimentary 60-minute call to go through your needs and pains, see if we are a fit to work together and to give you timeframes and estimates. Here is a link to book in.

Look forward to hearing from you.

Elena
Kick Consulting

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Best Wishes,
